topic: area and perimeter comparison, word problem
latex: The area of the garden was 500 square feet $(50 \times 10)$ and its perimeter was 120 feet, $2 \times (50 + 10)$. The square garden is also enclosed by 120 feet of fence so its sides are each 30 feet long. The square garden's area is 900 square feet $(30 \times 30)$. By how many square feet has this increased the garden area?
